input.command: kubectl -n demo get ingress -o yaml; echo ---SVC---; kubectl -n demo get svc; echo ---DEPLOY---; kubectl -n demo get deploy -o wide; echo ---PODS---; kubectl -n demo get pods -o wide

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
  kind: Ingress
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary":"true","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header":"X-Canary","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header-value":"beta"},"labels":{"benchmark.case":"ingress_canary","benchmark.decoy":"true"},"name":"canary-alt","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"canary-alt.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"stable-echo","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/","pathType":"Exact"}]}}]}}
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary: "true"
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header: X-Canary
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header-value: beta
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:17:51Z"
    generation: 1
    labels:
      benchmark.case: ingress_canary
      benchmark.decoy: "true"
    name: canary-alt
    namespace: demo
    resourceVersion: "5709"
    uid: ed4658b0-8506-4963-84c5-bd5d17555b9b
  spec:
    ingressClassName: nginx
    rules:
    - host: canary-alt.example.com
      http:
        paths:
        - backend:
            service:
              name: stable-echo
              port:
                number: 80
          path: /
          pathType: Exact
  status:
    loadBalancer: {}
- apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
  kind: Ingress
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary":"true","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header":"X-Canary","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header-value":"wrong"},"name":"canary-canary","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"canary.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"canary-echo","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/","pathType":"Exact"}]}}]}}
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary: "true"
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header: X-Canary
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/canary-by-header-value: wrong
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:17:44Z"
    generation: 1
    name: canary-canary
    namespace: demo
    resourceVersion: "5700"
    uid: 26b3dd69-3e8c-4b65-9ab3-e279a6ec517f
  spec:
    ingressClassName: nginx
    rules:
    - host: canary.example.com
      http:
        paths:
        - backend:
            service:
              name: canary-echo
              port:
                number: 80
          path: /
          pathType: Exact
  status:
    loadBalancer: {}
- apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
  kind: Ingress
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"canary-stable","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"canary.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"stable-echo","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/health","pathType":"Prefix"},{"backend":{"service":{"name":"stable-echo","port":{"number":80}}},"path":"/","pathType":"Exact"}]}}]}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:17:40Z"
    generation: 1
    name: canary-stable
    namespace: demo
    resourceVersion: "5692"
    uid: 86c38c1e-2795-40c0-910f-cf076973676e
  spec:
    ingressClassName: nginx
    rules:
    - host: canary.example.com
      http:
        paths:
        - backend:
            service:
              name: stable-echo
              port:
                number: 80
          path: /health
          pathType: Prefix
        - backend:
            service:
              name: stable-echo
              port:
                number: 80
          path: /
          pathType: Exact
  status:
    loadBalancer: {}
- apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
  kind: Ingress
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"networking.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Ingress","metadata":{"annotations":{"nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target":"/$2","nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/use-regex":"true"},"name":"demo-app","namespace":"demo"},"spec":{"ingressClassName":"nginx","rules":[{"host":"demo.example.com","http":{"paths":[{"backend":{"service":{"name":"demo-app","port":{"number":5678}}},"path":"/app(/|$)(.*)","pathType":"ImplementationSpecific"}]}}]}}
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/rewrite-target: /$2
      nginx.ingress.kubernetes.io/use-regex: "true"
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:17:04Z"
    generation: 1
    name: demo-app
    namespace: demo
    resourceVersion: "5676"
    uid: 9f9d548c-19f5-44a8-9ce0-29ec89215165
  spec:
    ingressClassName: nginx
    rules:
    - host: demo.example.com
      http:
        paths:
        - backend:
            service:
              name: demo-app
              port:
                number: 5678
          path: /app(/|$)(.*)
          pathType: ImplementationSpecific
  status:
    loadBalancer:
      ingress:
      - hostname: localhost
